---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "feat: <short description>"
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What user problem are you trying to solve? Describe the pain point — not the solution.

> Example: "Restaurant owners lose track of which dishes are sold out across the day."

## Proposed solution

How might MenuRay address this? A rough sketch is fine — we'll align on details before code.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about? Why this one?

## Who benefits

Which users? (Restaurant owners, diners, both? A specific subset like multi-store chains?)

## Scope

Is this a small UI tweak, a new screen, a new backend feature, or all of the above?

## Open questions

What's unclear about this proposal that needs discussion?
